title: The Singapore homeowner's latest travel obsession? Furniture shopping in Foshan – here's what to know
Smart Reads of the Week: Singapore Dividend Stocks, REITs, and Passive Income Strategies
article:
Building wealth doesn’t have to be complicated. A portfolio of quality dividend stocks, resilient REITs, and disciplined investing can create a reliable stream of passive income while growing your wealth over time.
This week’s Smart Reads explores practical strategies for income investors, from building a monthly dividend portfolio and selecting retirement-ready REITs to uncovering hidden dividend gems. We also compare REIT yields with T-bills, explain US dividend withholding tax, and show how combining ETFs with Singapore stocks can help create a balanced portfolio for the long run.
Here are this week’s top articles:
How to Build a Monthly Passive Income Portfolio with Singapore Dividend Stocks
A practical guide to building a portfolio that generates dividend income throughout the year.
Blue-Chip REITs to Boost Your Retirement Income
These established REITs could help investors build a more reliable stream of retirement income.
Why I’m Holding Cash and Watching Microsoft & Sheng Siong Right Now
Why patience can be an investment strategy, and the quality stocks currently on the watchlist.
3 SGX REITs Rewarding Investors This Week
These REITs are putting fresh distributions into investors’ bank accounts this week.
3 Hidden Gem Dividend Stocks to Fund Your Retirement
Three lesser-known companies with the financial strength to support long-term dividend income.
REIT Yields vs. T-Bills: Has the Gap Widened Again?
We compare REIT yields against T-bill returns to see where income investors may find better value.
How to Combine ETFs and Singapore Stocks for a Balanced Portfolio
Learn how to blend broad market exposure with individual stock selection for a more balanced investment strategy.
US Dividend Withholding Tax Explained: How to Invest the Smart Way
Understand how withholding tax works and what it means for your long-term returns when investing in US dividend stocks.
How a simple 5-minute newsletter can shield your portfolio: When markets get noisy, Smart Reads helps you stay clear-headed with a calm, curated update like the week’s top investing stories, key market shifts, and practical insights for protecting your portfolio.
